notes: Handmade/vintage marketplace. Search-centric homepage with category navigation. Auth via header Sign In link. Cart icon in header. Cookie banner for EU visitors. Moderate DOM complexity with some dynamic loading for personalized recommendations.

endpoints.label: Search Bar
endpoints.description: Product search input with autocomplete and search submit button

endpoints.label: Sign In
endpoints.description: Header Sign In link opening login modal or redirecting to auth page

endpoints.label: Shopping Cart
endpoints.description: Cart icon with item count badge in header linking to cart page

endpoints.label: Category Navigation
endpoints.description: Horizontal category links: Jewelry, Clothing, Home & Living, Wedding, Gifts, etc.

endpoints.label: Favorites
endpoints.description: Heart icon linking to favorited/saved items list

endpoints.label: Cookie Consent Banner
endpoints.description: Cookie preferences banner with Accept button for EU/GDPR compliance

endpoints.label: Sell on Etsy
endpoints.description: Header link to open a seller shop on Etsy
